headline: INTC +9% on Trump/Apple chip deal dominates tape; WFE ripple (AMAT/LRCX) not priced, TSM bearish risk

market_state.line: Risk-on label but SPY -1.27% / QQQ -1.01% on day; VXX stress 0.95 low. Broad tape soft — entries need discipline, don't chase.

actions.line: Half size; Signal+Risk aligned bullish, research clean — tightest R/R on the desk today.
Quarter size only — Apple/foundry catalyst confirmed but Signal warns of chasing at current levels.
Quarter size; Signal+Risk constructive on aerospace/defense names, research neutral — wide stop reflects medium severity.

watch.line: High-confidence INTC ripple: largest WFE vendor, direct beneficiary of Intel 18A/14A capacity ramp for Apple/foundry customers.
High-confidence INTC ripple: etch/dep leader, new foundry customer wins pull incremental tool orders at AZ/OH fabs.
High-confidence INTC ripple BEARISH: Apple is ~25% of TSMC revenue — any wafer shift to Intel Foundry hits leading-edge mix.
+21.5% on 2x rel vol, MACD bullish — tape leader; no desk take yet, watch for pullback entry setup.
+11.6% on 2x rel vol, overbought flag — catalyst unclear, watch for confirmation before engaging.

changed: INTC added to actions — Trump/Apple chip deal is the new dominant catalyst replacing RXT as headline driver.
OCUL added as new desk take (quarter size).

caveats: AH/Pre-market scan as of 06:37 ET Jun 18 2026 — prices stale, spreads wide; RTH open may gap significantly from these levels.
